# Amplifier Module Tool Search

Self-contained search tools module for Amplifier, providing grep and glob functionality for file searching and content searching.

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11+
- Part of the Amplifier framework ecosystem

## Development
```bash
pip install -e ".[dev]"
python -m pytest
```

## Structure
This is an Amplifier tool module that provides search operations.

## Conventions
- Follow existing code patterns
- Include type hints
- Write docstrings for public functions
